name: Decision-to-Diagram
objective: Make a future customer-approved abstract decision structure inspectable through text diagrams and node-edge specifications.
non_goals: No image generation, external source search, visual provider, OCR, or publishing.
outputs: Future text diagram and node-edge specification.
excluded_patterns: Onboarding and repository maps need their own user and structure evidence.
known_gaps: The proposal does not generate an image or validate a diagram with users.
